DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHMITT HEATING CO, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHMITT HEATING CO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRANTS, DYLAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
